headline: Assessing Expand Energy (EXE) Valuation After Analyst Upgrade And Shifting Oil Price Outlook
summary: Expand Energy (EXE) is back in focus after announcing plans to present at the 5th Annual Connected Worker, Energy Summit in Houston on March 24, 2026, featuring Executive VP and COO Joshua J. Viets. See our latest analysis for Expand Energy. The conference appearance and recent inclusion in a list of preferred energy names come as the stock shows building momentum, with a 7.03% 1 month share price return and a 219.39% 5 year total shareholder return. If you are looking beyond Expand Energy...
